---
id: patch-companies-company-id-supplier-payment-details
title: "patch-companyId-supplierPaymentDetails"
description: "This service updates the payment entry for an order once payment is done offline.Key fields that gets updated are payment date and Payment success indicator. This helps in Payment fulfillment tracking and in financial audits."
sidebar_label: "patch-companyId-supplierPaymentDetails"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "patch api-method"
info_path: docs/api/stock-management-api-spec
custom_edit_url: null
---

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"patch-companyId-supplierPaymentDetails"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/companies/{companyId}/supplierPaymentDetails"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This service updates the payment entry for an order once payment is done offline.Key fields that gets updated are payment date and Payment success indicator. This helps in Payment fulfillment tracking and in financial audits.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
